description: Write or substantially improve the Roxygen2 documentation for `compare_models()`. The documentation must include: a detailed `@description`; `@param ...` explaining that one or more `ModelResult` objects or a list of them can be passed; `@param names`; a `@return` describing the data frame structure; a `@seealso` cross-reference to `[fit_model_s4()]` and `[cross_validate()]`; and a self-contained `@examples` block that creates two `FitConfig` objects, fits two models on `mtcars`, and calls `compare_models()` on the results.
